   "reasoning": "I've seen three waves of reform come and go, but I know what I need to keep my students afloat: more staff to reduce class sizes and some breathing room in my workload. That's why I'm pushing hard for staff hiring and teacher incentives - we need to stop the bleeding. I'm not thrilled about attendance mandates or transparency reports, they just add to the paperwork and take away from what matters: teaching and supporting my students.",
